content:
✨ Telegram-Drive | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide users with a free, unlimited, and secure cloud storage solution by leveraging their existing Telegram accounts.
✨ Key Features: • Unlimited Cloud Storage • High Performance Grid • Auto-Updates • Media Streaming • PDF Viewer
📖 Summary: Telegram Drive is an open-source desktop application that transforms your Telegram account into a secure, unlimited cloud storage solution. It provides a familiar file explorer interface for managing files directly on Telegram's servers using its API.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

✨ hyperframes | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To enable AI agents and developers to easily create and render video content using HTML and CSS, streamlining the video production workflow.
✨ Key Features: • HTML-based video rendering framework • Integration with AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Codex) • Support for GSAP animations • AI agent skills for generating compositions and animations • CLI commands for rendering
📖 Summary: Hyperframes is an open-source video rendering framework that allows users to create video compositions using HTML and CSS. It integrates with AI agents to facilitate the creation process, enabling users to describe desired videos and have the AI generate the HTML/CSS code for rendering.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

🔥 everything-ai-ml | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a structured and comprehensive collection of learning materials for individuals interested in mastering Generative AI and Machine Learning.
✨ Key Features: • Curated collection of learning resources • Covers Generative AI, Machine Learning, Agentic AI, LLMs, RAG, Fine-tuning, MLOps
📖 Summary: This repository is a comprehensive, curated collection of learning resources for Generative AI, Machine Learning, and related advanced topics. It serves as a central hub for individuals looking to deepen their understanding and skills in these rapidly evolving fields, offering a structured path from foundational concepts to advanced applications.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

✨ omniget | Rust
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a unified desktop environment for downloading and studying online courses and digital books, enhancing the learning experience with integrated study tools and content management.
✨ Key Features: • Download and watch online courses (Hotmart, Udemy, Kiwify, etc.)
📖 Summary: OmniGet is an open-source desktop application designed for efficient online learning and content consumption. It allows users to download courses from various platforms and read digital books (PDF, EPUB) within the app, offering features like timestamped notes, flashcards, and focus modes to enhance studying. Additionally, it supports downloading videos from social media and torrents.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
